python3 -c "
import base64,gzip,json,os
d=json.loads(gzip.decompress(base64.b64decode('')))
for p,c in d.items():
 P='/mnt/pool/plexiptv-stack/'+p
 os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(P),exist_ok=True)
 open(P,'w').write(c)
print(f'All {len(d)} files written!')
" && cd /mnt/pool/plexiptv-stack && docker build -t plexiptv:latest . && echo "SUCCESS: image built!"
